description: Perform a technical audit of https://crawler-test.com/ to identify internal links blocked by the 'nofollow' attribute. Export the internal nofollow outlinks as a CSV to /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/internal_nofollow_report.csv. Additionally, write a summary report to /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/nofollow_summary.txt containing the total count of nofollow links identified and one example URL pair (Source -> Destination).
